## beehiiv automation-journeys get

Get automation journey

### Synopsis

Get automation journey

Retrieve a single automation journey by ID.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/automations/{automationId}/journeys/{automationJourneyId}

```
beehiiv automation-journeys get <automationId> <automationJourneyId> [flags]
```
